enriched_points.expanded_content: Aspen Plus enables detailed modeling of chemical processes, integrating economic assessments to provide insights into production costs and profitability (Source 2).
MATLAB facilitates complex simulations, allowing users to manipulate variables and analyze dynamic systems, essential for optimizing economic performance (Source 5).
Excel is widely used for data analysis, offering powerful tools for statistical analysis, financial modeling, and visualization of techno-economic data (Source 4).
These tools provide flexibility across various applications, supporting diverse industries in conducting comprehensive techno-economic analyses tailored to specific project needs (Source 1).
